channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Anon, someone oneshotted a Runescape-quality MMO with Claude. — 57 replies — 143.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anon, someone oneshotted a Runescape-quality MMO with Claude.

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:28 UTC

OP

Anon, someone oneshotted a Runescape-quality MMO with Claude. If you're not able to get filthy rich with this tech, you are just a brainless clown.

https://worldofclaudecraft.com/

Early replies (first 3)

62362742
oldschool runescape is free

62362747
looks like shit
>If you're not able to get filthy rich with this tech, you are just a brainless clown.
sure if you can scam some subhumans but you're competing with 1 billion jeet scammers

62362749
>>62362737
Buy
An
Ad
!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363987
>>62363619
I played it for 9 hours, reached max lvl and completed all quests. WTF do I do now?

62364002
>>62362742
So the Jannies can afford it. Very kind of them.

62364043
>>62363623
Yeah but being able to spam "nigger" is pretty old school, most modern games would fine a way to permaban you for that

62364090
>>62363642
it is the point, these retarded scriptkiddies think it's amazing to pay anthropic to shit out something worse then something already available for free. all claude can do is copy open source code

62364293
>>62364090
Claude can do so much more than you think. get good at prompting

62364348
>>62364090
When are you retards going to learn? LLMs learn in almost the same way humans do. They understand things conceptually.

62364357
People with balls played this MMO

62364390
>>62363118
it's not automatic, there's literally a mod that goes through the chat logs and bans anyone who says nigger

62364391
>>62362753
So you get to be a funko pop?

62364400
sounds gay

62364408
>>62364390
What's he get paid?

62364447
>>62362737
IMAGINE OSRS 2.0 holy

62364461
>>62362843
>>62362844
it's so over for snailcat retards

62364719
>>62362737
impressive but 7 fps isn't going to work.

62364883
>>62364719
>7FPS isn't going to work
I bet you dont have hardware acceleration on dumbie

62364978
>>62363623
the assets are free open source models and stuff so it looks like shit

The gameplay is a classic wow clone, it's shockingly similar

62365021
>>62364090
Thanks...these dumbfucks thinks it cool they reskinned something and made it gay

62365211
>>62362737
>oneshotted
100% guarantee it wasn't actually "oneshotted". Also Fable 5 got banned already, even if you could one shot, it's over now.

62365245
>>62362737
this is trash

62365483
>>62362737
Dune banned AI for a reason.

62365496
>>62365211
/loop until complete

62365514
https://github.com/levy-street/world-of-claudecraft/blob/main/src/game/interactions.ts

>if if else if if else if if else else if if if else if

it's claude code alright

62365881
>>62362737
>Runescape-quality
so it's utter unplayable dogshit?
wow AI is the future

62365955
>>62362737
>>62362753
>>62363118
Globo-Homo Of SlopCraft

62365991
>>62362737
Very interesting. Not the project though, any starter $10 RPG template is a more complete game with less bugs. It's a completely useless code base worth $0. It's only impressive to people who understand nothing about game development. But it's interesting that OP hired spam bots for promotion. Is he somehow making money off of it?

62366047
>>62362742
>>62363625
in the shitty art style
also runescape is ultrashit skinner box

62366586
>>62364357
FUCK YEAH UTANI NIGGER

62366746
>>62362737
If you rip an existing open source game yourself rather than ask Claude to do it, you get documentation to go along with it.

62366802
>>62362737
Claude made me a trading bot for LINK. I am now down 99%. Thanks, claude!

62366858
>>62366802

perfect, 2 mistakes in one go!
>/biz/ dream

item.title: Hello, /biz/. I am a newfag full disclosure. However I have about $5,000 just sitting in my bank account and i would lik… — 30 replies — 113.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Hello, /biz/. I am a newfag full disclosure. However I have about $5,000 just sitting in my bank account and i would lik…

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:36 UTC

OP

Hello, /biz/.

I am a newfag full disclosure. However I have about $5,000 just sitting in my bank account and i would like to start investing it somewhere. I was doing a little bit of googling and it looks like getting into the s&p 500 is a good idea. A Roth IRA also looked okay, but i don't want to withdrawl it when i'm 100 years old and shitting in a bag.

What's the best place for investing for someone that's never invested in anything before? How do you even do it?

Thanks for your time, /biz.

Early replies (first 3)

62366502
I would not get too much of anything right now. Unless you don't mind bag holding for a few years. Good way to keep track of something but damn sure will you likely be averaging down in the bear market until it goes back up. Make sure that it is not too high nor something unlikely to survive in 5 years. DO NOT BUY MOONING STUFF.

62366509
>>62366401
Zcash or Litecoin

62366516
>>62366401
write down whatever suggestions you get
make a note not to invest in anything recommended to you here.
>>62366509
absolutely do not "invest" in crypto unless you want to lose your money.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366534
$5000 is nothing. Before you invest anything, you must allocate $10000 safety margin. Just so you could have a piece of mind. So you can afford nor worry about getting sick in the most responsible time.

Having done so, you will direct your other resources, with a better, clearer idea in your head., which is, DCA extra cash.

Investing $5k anywhere either wouldn't yield your shit, or you would lose it all and be double broke.

Do nor invest those it's to early to think about inflation here.

62366565
>>62366502
I really don't know about individual stocks which is why the s&p 500 looked interesting because of the average 7% growth, which outpaces inflation. However i don't have a high risk tolerance because im a baby back bitch

>>62366509
lol

>>62366516
i know to not buy crypto at least

>>62366534
I could do $10,000. That would just have me digging into emergency cash funds however.
i should be a bit more clear, My plan right now at least was $5,000 down now for upfront, and then $1,000 per month into the s&p 500. But i dont know shit about investing or if this even a good idea or not, on top of my low risk tolerance. right now my money is just sitting doing absolutely nothing.

62366571
S&p but you won't be a millionaire. Youll get a 3x in probably 20 years. Just DCA and chill

62366574
>>62366534
I started with just a few hundred doing AMC. Still less than $2000 is in stocks. Yeah I immediately sold and invested in other things. I did not bother to get my return on investments until January of this year. Then did the same thing 5 years ago but better. This is what happens when you start in a bull market. Go short and pick stocks that will ride out the bear market for the longs. Sure I made $1000 but never truly withdrew that didn't involve months of shuffling money around. This year I put 200 in and out depending on the month when I was buying and selling. It's really all the same money I put in 5 years ago plus investment returns.

Funny enough one of the stocks I did buy was AMC again because they finally stopped shorting. I think you might see a 5X return on investment on that. It's cheaper than most other movie theater stocks right now.

62366578
>>62366565
May point was HAVE $10k emergency fund first. THEN just DCA 4k/mo into 500. There isn't any other way.

62366584
>>62366401
Op, I'm gonna make something perfectly clear and transparent here.

Do not, I repeat, do not invest in anything crapto related. Anyone promoting anything crapto is a scammer and is looking for exit liquidity. Crapto has no marginal buyer, it has no uses, it gives you no rights. Those promoting it are merely looking for EXIT LIQUIDITY to pump their bags so they can take your CASH and move it into safer investments. Be smart and stick to GOOD STOCKS and INDEX FUNDS.

62366593
>>62366578
Ah shit sorry tou only have $1k/mo. Do that. Never fucking touch saylor with a 10 foot pole.

62366609
>>62366574
I might want to warn you about the capital gains tax. Especially if you don't hold for at least a year. Be prepared to donate to a charity with a portion of your gains. If you leave it in your stock portfolio keep enough money aside in your bank account for that charity too.

62366634
The one reason why I am not telling you to wait for the AI bubble is that we live in clown world. This stuff might keep pumping for a meme 2029 stock market crash. It was supposed to crash in 1927 according to this prediction from the 1875. Fairly accurate but also a self fulfilling prophesy.

62366652
>>62366578
"emergency fund" should at least be gold or VOO. Cash is trash.

62366675
>>62366571
not really looking to be rich. just looking to be free. i find myself in a very fortunate position at the moment, I have literally zero debts, very low bills, and a job.

>>62366574
What's AMC? i don't know any of the buzzwords.

>>62366593
What's saylor?

>>62366584
s&p 500 would be good then right?

>>62366652
I actually have some gold, silver, and platinum. not a lot, maybe about $5,000 at current value.

62366699
>>62366675
My strategy is to look for a stock at ATH with low P/E then look at the financials, mainly cash flow. If the stock has momentum, is cheap and is making cash you can't lose. Ignore technicals and "gut feelings" about the industry however I'd avoid cyclical stuff like commodities or retail.

62366731
>>62366509
Anything but ZEC. ZEC after a 10x pump in a bear market and then a major asset ending exploit that was up for years, ZEC is the next bagholder stock.

I ironically Litecoin will pay you more at this point, I'm not convinced that will do anything either though.

62366741
>>62366401
Look into dollar cost averaging at least anon

62366774
>>62366401
Listen faggot. Disregard everything everyone says here. My guess is is you are in your early 20’s.

62366786
You should go through a roth ira still first with such little $ always as your first deposit for investments after 401k match is met if available. $7500 is max deposit this year. You can always pull your deposited money back out anytime with no restrictions. Pulling out profits would be tax and penalties, but otherwise if you need it suddenly you could pull your 5k back out, leave your profits in the account.

62366788
>>62366774
All you need to do is buy Link. That will give you 700 Link already. Which is an amount that a lot of scrubs on reddit and Twitter haven’t even achieved yet. Link is changing the entire financial system which is why investing in anything else other than gold and silver is a waste of time.

Get the 700 link. Try and push it up to 1,000 or more if able to… and you’ll be literally retired in 2-7 years.

62366796
>>62366731
Don’t listen to this advice. It would be fine if you had 30k and wanted to gamble a bit with 5-10k…. But you only have 5k. Get the 700 LINK literally forget about it and slowly add more cuz each 100 link after that 700 link is a lot until you get to 1,500 link. Then each 100 after that doesn’t matter as much anymore based on your current living situation which probably isn’t that good.

62366812
>>62366774
nope. im old. had a rough time in my 20s and clawed my way out of crippling debt and now can finally invest into something.

>>62366786
that's interesting actually. i was under the impression that you can't pull anything out of your Roth IRA until you're shitting into a bag on your deathbed pretty much. Why can't you do more than $7500? I was reading that it's a way safer investment too. I was also thinking about a High Yield Savings account, because i have a very low risk tolerance.

I have a special super power that the second i put money into anything it will immediately disappear.

62366816
>>62366534
>$5000 is nothing

He is right. You have zero chance to change your life with this amount unless you put it into Link. 700 Link for 5k…. Slowly boost it up to 1,000 Link and you’ll are now part of a 25,000 person club with at minimum 1,000 link in the world. This is the only way you will get your freedom. And when you don’t invest in it and you realize you could have saved yourself listening to this post 3 years from now when everyone is being rounded up and thrown in UBI camps… you will kys for not listening to me before you get rounded up.

62366824
>>62366812
Ok well whatever… you are in your late 30’s. Buy Link. That’s literally all you have to do. All the other bullshit is noise. Even if you happen to do relatively well in stocks it’s all overinflated and will collapse. Don’t invest in the market with the rest of the riffraff. Just buy link. It’s your only way out.

62366834
>>62366824
I don't know what a Link is.

62366841
It’s one thing you get fucked when there was no way you couldn’t get fucked. But to know about something and not invest in it and then it changed how everything is done… then you will Kys for not acting. Even holding BTC and selling 8 years early wasn’t a big deal cuz no one knew. But now we know how high some of these coins can go and we know how fucked everything is now. Link is the way out.

62366846
>>62366834
Chainlink. This board has had a minimum of a dozen threads on it for 9 years now. Get coinbase acct and buy Chainlink

62366848
>>62366846
Minimum of a dozen threads daily for 9 years I meant

62366887
>>62366675
American Classic Movies. It just stopped being a meme stock and a normal safe stock that is low right now. They are done shorting. I am serious. Bought right before the bleeding stopped and turned around. Bobo broke up with Melvin!

62366897
it depends whether you are investing for retirement or if you want to use the money before then. if for retirement I would open a Roth IRA and invest in an s&p 500 etf or VTI. if not for retirement, I would do the same in a regular taxable account. if using a taxable account, I would get in the habit of investing a little more each month. maybe set up an automatic scheduled transfer from your bank account to your brokerage account. also make sure to set up automatic dividend reinvestment.

item.title: I am SO fucking bored of my zero work WFH job. — 24 replies — 96.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I am SO fucking bored of my zero work WFH job.

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:37 UTC

OP

I am SO fucking bored of my zero work WFH job. I still have to sit and do nothing in meetings.

I'm a natural autist so other people took my responsibilities and I have around 10% of the responsibility that the person who previously had my job had. I can't actually function in corporations. I can do the work and so on, I just can't dance the social dance that gets people to do things.

I work in a huge and slow corporation where everything takes many months longer to achieve than expected. My CV has gained close to nothing for over 2 years.

I literally daydream about being unemployed.

Around 5 years ago I'd feel smug at being in this position but now that I'm 30-something, I see my career and life as finite and I'm really gaining nothing here apart from savings to spend when I'm much older, uglier, and physically decrepit.

Early replies (first 3)

62363546
>>62363542
stfu faggot u could be jobless or even homeless u fucking nigger stop crying and just jerk off like everyone else at their wfh job and collect the money

god

62363548
I'm unemployed but also bored

62363552
You think you'd rather be in a stressful job you have to commute in for?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363560
>>62363542
maybe if you weren't fat you'd have more pep in your step

62363600
wow life is so hard for you

62363627
>>62363542
Kys

62363727
>>62363542
You need to be working on some projects and passions in your free time. Find something you enjoy or care about and get involved in it. If it’s something adjacent to what you currently do professionally that’s best but you also need a life outside work. Go volunteer at the animal shelter to walk pibbles or something.

62363741
You found a goldmine and youre complaining?

Cherish everyday that youre making easy money

62363783
must really suck getting paid for doing nothing

62363810
There is no such thing as wfh, its a psyop

62364014
>>62363542
You’re basically on corporate dole so just find some other hobby to monetize or play video games

62364028
>>62363542
What big corp? I wanna short it.

62364097
>>62363542
Dude just play video games off camera lol

62364107
>>62363783
this what the fuck is OP saying
>i want to WOOORK MOOAR give me THING TO DO I DON'T WANT FREE MONEY
fuckin just find other ways to entertain yourself goddamn, you're lucky as fuck you dont have to work much and collect a check

62364133
>>62363741
He has nothing going on, I had many jobs just like the one he has now. My whole life has been jobs where I do nothing. I know what it is like. Still better than working though.

62364788
>>62363542
Invest your time in building up your knowledge or skill on something. I was in your position and it got to the point where I was so fed up with my job that I left it even though I was constantly trying new things and learning on my own time. But I also left with the plan of breaking into the blockchain industry. I still don't have job now but I registered a company and am trying to find funding for it.

62364902
>>62363542
im in the literal and actual exact same position as you

62365103
>>62363542
Buy a Dance Dance Revolution machine (Really, you only need the dance pad and a PC that can run the software).
Attach webcam and computer to it.
During meetings play DDR with headphones on.
Now you will no longer be bored during meetings.

62365142
>>62365103
this is a great idea. If boomers can use treadmills while on meetings I can AI AI AI I'M YOUR LITTLE BUTTERFLY GREEN BLACK AND BLUE MAKE THE COLORS IN THE SKY

62365150
>>62363552
I’m a doctor, have those and enjoy my job. If i don’t want to do anything useful, i take a vacation.

62365163
>>62363542
so give me your job and you can be unemployed instead
getting free money for producing nothing is better than getting no money while also doing nothing because you have no money
learn a hobby to do between the meetings

62365165
>>62365142
HEYO CAPTAIN JACK
BRING DOWN TO THE RAILROAD TRACK

62365696
Same position but I just play bf6 all day. Yeah, I could learn something but why bother. Unless I can get a stupid amount of money my life wouldn't change at all

62366903
>>62364097
>>62365696
this is what I do and I'm pretty happy

item.title: What if ETH actually doesn't recover though — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What if ETH actually doesn't recover though

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:40 UTC

OP

What if ETH actually doesn't recover though

Early replies (first 3)

62365840
>>62365835
>if

62365842
>>62365835
I ll never touch crypto anymore(wont happen, he must bait us)

62365850
All they have to do is figure out how to upgrade its speed to compete with basedlana and telegram's blockchain but noooo vitalik wants to write science fiction books now.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365852
>>62365835
bitcoin maximalists were right

62365855
>>62365850
unfortunately, to achieve fast finality they would have to cap the validator set

62365892
>>62365855
Yes, its decenrralized.

62365899
The best incentive is no incentive…incentivized blockchains will not make it long term

62365925
>>62365850
Speed has very little to do with the current situation

62366074
What does crypto have going for it atm? Banking on the whole 'cycle' narrative is retarded and feels scammy to say the least. The market is too volatile and openly manipulated. They aren't even trying to hide it anymore. Is the crypto space cooked for real or what?

62366099
>>62366074
Tokenization of real world assets is what I’m excited about….but I’m a land owner

62366122
>>62365835
Don't worry, the Clarity Act will be the wave that lifts all ships! Hang tight!

62366127
>>62366099
I'm a bit of a retard, but what does that mean? I saw people mentioning RWAs for years now and I never thought much of it. It seems like it still hasn't taken off yet?

62366404
>>62365835
I've been holding eth since 2015, sold a couple weeks back. Fuck this gay shit.

62366649
>>62366127
RWAs is just another crypto buzzword. It’s part of a long list of other useless buzzwords that have been spammed here for years. No one cares about crypto ai, web3, crypto gaming, depin, privacy, rwas, etc. it’s all bullshit pushed on by scammers and grifters

62366825
>>62366127
There are trillions of dollars worth of illiquid assets out there (land, gold, diamonds, art, wine, etc.)
Tokenization of rwa will let people tokenize their asset, borrow a stablecoin against it, park it somewhere and collect 4-8% interest
Most normies like the retard above do not understand this because most of them do not own any assets (like land).
Tokenization will make me a shit ton of money, and this is also why it will pump crypto that is well positioned to tokenize assets (xrp)
Plan accordingly

62366836
>>62366127
And it hasn’t taken off because it hasn’t been legal to do so, but the passage of the clarity act will remedy this…also why banks are seething

62366913
>>62365835
>What if ETH actually doesn't recover though
Swap what value you have left into XMR

62366917
>>62365835
Wait, what? Why would it go back to ATH again?

item.title: My diabolical plan to get rich: I invest money in the stock market. — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
My diabolical plan to get rich: I invest money in the stock market.

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:39 UTC

OP

My diabolical plan to get rich:
I invest money in the stock market.
Every single day, I aim to make 1% profit on what I started with that day. Just one percent.
If I make 1% profit on the first day, my total is 101%. My new base is 101%, and the next day I make 1% profit on THAT. And I keep going.
Over time, this will make my wealth fucking EXPLODE.
ln(38)/ln(1.01) gives me 365.57
That's right, I'll 38x my money in a year. Sounds fucking crazy, but it sounds doable.

Early replies (first 3)

62362716
>>62362705
That doesn’t sound bad

62362733
>Just win everyday and never lose bro

62362734
That’s how I became a trillionaire, best of luck to you ol’ chap

>t. Elon Musk

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62364969
>trades 365/year
Nice...sounds like having 3 jobs

62365314
>>62362705
Well the market isn't open every day but other than that you plan is fairly reasonable with the caveat that there is a limit to the scalability so you can't just become a billionaire with the same strategy. Currently my goal is to trade 20 days a month and make $1000 per day which is slightly less than 0.5% my portfolio but 1% average is perfectly achievable if you're skilled and wiling to take on a little more risk.

62365326
sounds like doing 3times a 20x in a row!
yeah in theory might be possible but in reality not so much...

62365337
bvsed

62365353
>>62365337
kek

62365408
>>62365314
>it's totally achievable if you ignore that it can (and most likely will) fail
How would you feel if you didn't have breakfast this morning?

62366380
>>62365408
Of course there is no guarantees and I have no idea what OP's specific trading strategy is or how much capital and experience if any he is starting out with. All I was saying is that its actually not ridiculous to grow you portfolio by 1% per day at least into the several 100ks at which point you will start running into liquidity issues.
>How would you feel if you didn't have breakfast this morning?
Not sure how this is relevant but I never eat breakfast so I would feel just fine.

62366912
>>62366380
>All I was saying is that its actually not ridiculous to grow you portfolio by 1% per day
Yeah it is. Some of the best traders on the planet can only achieve 250% per year, and these are people who worked 60 hours a week for 10 years.

item.title: Internet Computer $ICP ranks #2 in recent developer activity among AI and big-data-focused projects — 5 replies — 20.0/hr

Internet Computer $ICP ranks #2 in recent developer activity among AI and big-data-focused projects

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:50 UTC

OP

You can shit on the price all you want but data doesn’t lie. ICP is undervalued as fuck.

Early replies (first 3)

62366198
>>62366197

62366230
>>62366198
the number of meaningful wallets that hold between 1K-5K
$ICP
(Dolphins) and 5K-10K (Sharks) continues increasing

62366243
>dev activity
literally just looting the coffers of the org

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366262
>>62366243
Fuck off nigger, ICP is the only real innovative thing in this shit market.

62366953
how are these metrics tracked and recorded? is it only dfinity development activity or does it count builders in the ecosystem as well?

item.title: WTF — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:47 UTC

OP

>try day trading
>lose
>try holding spot
>lose
>try trade with trend
>lose
>try trade against trend
>lose
>try day trading
>lose
>try any trading method
>lose
wtf i should do bros i dont want to return wageslaving still has 30k capital left.

Early replies (first 3)

62366888
>>62366886
You clearly haven't lost enough, keep going.

62366893
You should be wageslaving until you have either 400k in investments or enough to make bare minimum 6k a month in interest. You've fucked up, OP

62366920
>>62366886
Spent 60 hours a week studying trading strategies for at least a year before you put in real money.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366946
there's numbers are probability of a loss based on how long you hold a stock

just holding for one year, you have 75% odds that you'll be up

item.title: I want to buy SpaceX but it's midday Saturday in the UK and the market is closed. — 13 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-06-14 18:46 UTC

OP

62362877
If you want to replicate the experience just take whatever you were going to invest, and put it directly in the burn barrel

62362888
>>62362877

62362890
>>62362868

62362894
>>62362868
you can buy perpetual contracts on binance.

62362900
>>62362888
Just wait a week or two, and you’ll be the one celebrating for not being the exit liquidity for Musky boy and his friends during SpaceX’s multigenerational stock price collapse.

62362938
>>62362900
actually, no. those people will get to dump too.

the actual bagholders will be every single person with a retirement account once the fasttrack goes through

62363091
Just buy scratch tickets, you'd fare better.

62363098
>>62362900
>just wait two more weeks

You already missed out on a 30% gain so you could sit back and smugly post bad advice that doesn’t make money

62363103
>>62362868
>I am retarded and my accent is gay
Fixed 4 u

62363545
>>62363098
Oh no… I missed out on a few hundred bucks in profit on like five shares that I would have gotten if Musky boy would have blessed me with that many at the start of the IPO. Talk to me when the market closes next Thursday; we’ll see how much profit you are in by then.

62363628
>>62363098
pink FML ID
>>62363545
mog ID
yeah I think we got the winner

62364130
>>62362868
Buy Space X perps on Hyperliquid. I wouldn't though. 90x value to earnings is INSANE. The early meme and forced passive index buying pump was predictable but the bubble will disappear unless the Open AI falls apart and all the liquidity from that flows into it and Anthropic, which I would like to happen but would not bet on.

62366723
>>62362868
Buy it on hyperliquid nigger
https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/join/SHIN

item.title: The business model of AI is getting a little funky.. — 7 replies — 9.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
The business model of AI is getting a little funky..

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:10 UTC

OP

The business model of AI is getting a little funky..
I don't think this is a one off, you are always gonna be able to jailbreak them, and with increasing potency, increasing concerns of "national security".
Maybe we get a handful of companies with security clearance to utilize them, but if we say Anthropic does a "medical research AI" , you are gonna end up with a couple of customers e.g. Pfizer, Eli Lilly.. If they are the sole customers, then it is a LOT they have to pay anthropic to build this AI.

Early replies (first 3)

62366740
>>62366701
So?

62366745
>>62366701
Collapse of empire is always so messy

62366773
This is just going to give extra incentive for the Chinese to expand into that vacuum with a knockoff version kek

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366775
>>62366701
The "jailbreak" is blown way out of proportion. Any retard can get any ai to attempt to do "bad" stuff, only thing fable 5 had was speed and less need to error correct.

Probably boils down to the government wanting to set the world back another 10years for "national security" because they're afraid some goyium might stubble upon a AI assisted cure to cancer.
>BUT HAXKERS!!!!1!!!
>BUT BAD GOYYS!!!!1!!!!!1!!
Send another 20gorillianz to our greatest ally, i guess?

We're still in full globohomo mode and we can't have the masses solving problems without daddy government's approval.

62366781
>>62366773
>This is just going to give extra incentive for the Chinese to expand into that vacuum with a knockoff version kek
And this. Unironically pushing us behind.

62366784
>>62366775
Mode the leader of Anthropocene has been saying ai is dangerous and needs to be regulated for years, well he just got his wish haha

62366795
>>62366784
I hope a knockoff rolls out ASAP that we can run locally. This is retarded, the boomers ruining everything is getting tiresome.

item.title: Law of the jungle — 127 replies — 63.7/hr

Open thread • Replies: 127 • Updated: 2026-06-14 17:52 UTC

OP

>BAM BAM BAM
>STAB STAB STAB
W-WHY AM I DYING I AM RICH AND HAVE MONEY ROCKETS CARS AIEEEEEE
P-PLEASE SIRE SAVE M-
>BAM BAM BAM
NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-
>STAB HIS KIDS
AAAAAAH MY KIDDIES MY BLOODLINE WHY WHY
PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

Early replies (first 3)

62359354
>>62359336
a mentally buck busted normie is going to say """the law""" grants the rich physical immunity.... and even if it doesn't, they have like, body guards who are omnipotent, omniscient, and omnipresent. you can't do ANYTHING to the rich!!!! it's literally impossible!!!!!

62359360
>>62359336
We live in capitalism and I'm protected by the pigs u need to learn how to move nigga

62359387

>/biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365722
>>62365719

62365724
>>62359336

>KNOCK KNOCK KNOCK
W-WHY AM I GETTING ARRESTED I JUST MADE LE FUNNY POS-
>OPEN UP
NOOOOOOO IT WAS JUST A JOKE

62365730
>>62365722
Also in this shithole country labor isn't even worth it compared to gibs so I'd rather leech welfare and commit crimes than slave for poverty wages. I'm doing my part demoralizing these pathetic rightoid hard workers. The government pays for everything, gave me a huge house and I break the law almost daily KEK
I have everything my neighbours have

62365739
>>62359336
Yeah, but you won't do shit, though.

>>62359400
>t.never heard of drones

62365752
>>62365730
american lumpen do basically the same thing. american working poor also espouse righttarded views that further enrich their exploiters, retire into poverty, then cry bloody murder when anyone threatens their state funded retirement gibs like medicare/medicaid.

62365755
>>62365752
More like leisure class of the sewers
The only "negative" is that these working poor look down on me, but little do they know

62365772
The only respectable working class are the Marxists. Until the day you dare raise the red banners I'll keep on eating for you
At least I take the time to post agitprop inbetween gooning and smoking meth so you could say I engage in class struggle myself

62365810
>>62359336
The most based thread on /biz/

62365816
>>62365810
Meanwhile I got banned for posting a similar such thread the other day. Mods = fags
But lets keep it up comrades

62365827
>law of the jungle

Do you realize a man with a trillion dollars could hire 100,000 men to torture and rape you to death? lmao

62365831
>>62365827
that doesn't mean anything.

62365833
>>62365827
Yet he'd lose against a single methed out homeless nigger in psychosis
Curious no?

62365844
He will use his AI to imprison and torture you for writing this, jealous tard. You will be harmed by an AI forever.

62365846
>>62365844
is this the new striver cope?

62365866
>>62365659
this guy is either a larper or extremely lost.
>>/r/lgbt/
>>62365724
don't live in the UK

62365875
>>62365866
>4chan is my heckin super sekrit nazi hideout
Stfu faggot I've been here longer than you have
I used to be a capitalist cuck like most of you but something finally snapped recently. And I believe many on /biz/ are ready for a communist revolution having witnessed the capitalist system up close

62365880
>>62365827
The USA couldn't defeat Iran with a trillion dollars military
Russia couldn't defeat Ukraine with thousands of men. Ukraine can't defeat Russia with all the help they got from NATO nations

62366055
>>62365875
>I believe many on /biz/ are ready for a communist revolution
that's why /biz/ shits on communism so much.
>I used to be a capitalist cuck like most of you but something finally snapped recently.
you mean you're not making money and are too broke, in other words, stupid, to live comfortably in the system?
only poors want a redistribution of wealth.
>Stfu faggot I've been here longer than you have
No one cares. This is a crypto board and you're /pol/ posting.

62366077
>>62359336
why are you seething over someone else's wealth? someone that you don't even know? try it and you either end up dead or in prison either way you still lose.

62366107
>>62366055
materially I am personally comfortable though
But I want it all because I'm not a cuck like you

62366123
>>62365833

No he wouldn't. Power has never been individual and has always been about your ability to build organizations and leverage armies of men, dumbfuck. Can't even edgelord right without sounding like a toddler.

62366125
>Create strife and problems
>Create poor people by infiltrating government and taxing everyone to death and beyond
>"Gommunism will save you!"

62366130
>>62365880

We weren't talking about that, we were basing it off of your retarded little "but I could shoot him" hypothetical. If we're talking straight gang laws Elon Musk is still able to conquer entire micronations, much less have to deal with you lmfao.

That's actually one thing that's always vexed me, how cucked and servile billionaires must be to not leverage their astronomic wealth more in violent ways. Because they can afford to disappear anyone they want.

62366171
>>62366123
>Power has never been individua
BANG BANG BANG
>ACK WHY AM I DYING!
>I AM SUPER NEXT LEVEL RICH WITH CONTROL OF MY DADDIES BANKS AND THE COUNTRY
>I HAVE BILLIONS OF DOLLARS AND HUGE ARMIES OF SECURITY AND CARS
>THEY KILLED ME I WANT JUSTICE!
news says he dies of heart attack and case is closed
>NO NO NO THEY KILLED ME IT WASN'T A HEART ATTACK PLEASE
BANG BANG BANG
>AIIEEEEE MY MONEY TAKE IT!
dies

62366359
>>62366171
we'll smash blokhins record, comrade!

62366421
>>62366107
>I want it all
ok goy. you first. go rob a CEO or whatever dumb fuck move you think is going to make your life great and not just burn everything to the ground.
The reality is you have no power to change your situation.

62366441
>>62366421
Patiently biding my time until the day I may throw my red-hot glowing piece of coal into the palace of Capitalism

62366449
>>62366441
so you're planning on being an economic failure?
If you were able to become rich, you wouldn't want to burn things down.
If you weren't able to become rich, you're too stupid to become rich after a successful revolution.
BTW, pro tip: a successful revolution for retards like you is impossible.

62366459
>>62366449
Don't put words in my mouth you capitalist swine

62366543
>>62366449

item.title: how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE… — 39 replies — 36.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE…

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-06-14 18:48 UTC

OP

how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEET would they be fine with it.. probably not i think they want you to be grinding your job 24/7 and making like 400k a year

Early replies (first 3)

62365550
dating is outdated chud, find something else to focus on

62365555
>>62365550
but i want a gf to watch mobis with, to eat some delicious food, cook together maybe and stuff.. I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection we could do it together if i had a gf

:(

62365557
>>62365540
a good prostitute in euro cuck land will service you starting from 100$ for 30 mins. Anything else is cope

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365621
>>62365555
I don't know how dudes get made like this at the factory.
TBQHWY I don't want to listen to one for even 5 minutes outside of the chase.

They're never interested in the same stuff as us, even they're pickmes who pretend to be so, and I don't enjoy long shaggy dog tales about minor interpersonal drama with all the emotional/situational context.

62365625
>>62365608
this you ?

62365626
>>62365617
I look like this basically. Worse jaw line and hair and skin but in general, the same. Same height.

62365635
>>62365540
You just need to be someone she can follow.
>10mil
>plenty of spare time
>want to cook
You are a catch anon, sooner you realise sooner the girls will. Then they will follow you and touch your pee pee. Money is irrelevant, I hide it because I don't want to be tricked and user.

62365657
>>62365540
>would they be fine with it
Sure. They'll be even happier with half of it.

62365661
>>62365555
Sounds like you want a friend or bro not a gf

62365697
>>62365555
Checked. Women think men are sex addicts, when we just want someone to watch Shrek with on bluray

62365735
>>62365697
>>62365600
damn is it really that bad to wanna watch high quality movies with a gf on bluray?? I have streaming apps but im tired of them since theyre all shit

62365738
>>62365587

- Looks = 1 - 10
- Wealth = 1 - 10
- Status = 1 - 10

- Personality = 1 - 10 (Low personality score = go-with-the-flow, outgoing, fun and risk-taking behavior. High personality score = standoffish, self-isolating, boring and risk-averse behavior.)

- Proximity = 1 - 10 (Low proximity score = living in a dense urban area and working in a high-volume traffic area. High proximity score = living in a rural area and working in a low-volume traffic area.)

- High-Value Male = 50+ Points
- Average Male = 10 - 25 Points
- Low-Value Male = 0 - 9 Points
- Incel = < 0 Points

62365748
>>62365540
Women want a 9+ handsome face, ripped bod and big dick. Money is cope.

62365871
>>62365540
>>62365555
You answered your own question. It's not about a specific threshold of money it's the perception you're working hard for HER specifically.

genuinely nice girls exist, but are extremely rare. if you want to NEET with someone for eternity unironically date an r9k foid

62365882
>>62365540
The biggest complaints from women are men who are mean, slobs and irresponsible. So if you have a bunch of money and want to NEET, it shouldn’t be that hard to sweep a fellow nerdy girl off her feet. Be affectionate, have a clean space, and don’t blow off things like a date night or blow through all your money lol
The girls who want grindset dudes are most likely to divorce rape you.

62365897
>>62365871
I think the problem is that nice girls are the hardest to find and not even that rare. I know several that still live at home to take care of their parents/family, and have at-home hobbies like knitting/crafting.
When the fuck would you meet any of them?? Especially if they work from home or a female dominated field like childcare.
My best advice will always be to make friends with people and then ask if they know any single women that would be a good match for you. You have to have the ability to show people you’re a good friend that wouldn’t fuck yup their friendship with the girl though

62365953
>>62365882
>mean, slobs, irresponsible
These are the complaints women have about the men they continue to date. So the stuff that is annoying but not a dealbreaker.

62365958
>>62365882
yet somehow that is the type they are attracted to and want to have kids with

62365989
>>62365540
>6’5’’
>8 inch sick with 6 inch girth
>230lbs lean and cut muscle but you can’t be a workout freak you need to have the muscle naturally without doing much exercise all the time
>Perfect hairline, as good as a teenagers
>square jaw line
>wide shoulders
>deep voice
>be naturally extroverted and charismatic
>have many high status friends
>have many ex girl friends so you pass women’s pre-selection requirement
>have 10 million dollars but also have a high status job like a brain surgeon or fighter jet pilot so she can brag to her friends what you do for a living
>be able to speak 3 different languages so you can make her wet when your at the high end French restaurant and talk to the waiter in French and order a high end wine bottle
>have a dark and mysterious secret about yourself to keep her intrigued and excited (maybe you are the world’s best assassin, maybe you are an associate of a multi-billion dollar drug operation as a high ranking middleman, or you are a genius and secretly working on a project to save the energy crisis. Something that is cool and will make her wet when she finds out


This is what you need to get a 5/10 or higher in the year of 2020+6

62366005
>>62365587
>>62365738
Do the math OP.

62366027
>>62365989
>have all this
>become her bf
>she cheats on you with a nigga that has NOTHING of this

62366041
>>62365608
Animal should be allowed to just breed and leave, there is nothing like third parties in the interaction.

62366052
>>62365557
>dude just get herpes with a romanian gypsy in a shitty hotel in the suburbs

kys

62366054
>Women or leveraged, margined silver miners?
Mmmmm...... you're gonna have to get back to me on that bro

62366257
>>62365587
>>62365738
>>62366005
^ This system is outdated, but I've invented a new one. The equation is identical, but the compounding effects of the numerator have been upscaled, personality remains the same. Proximity now has a negative and positive value.

62366581
>>62366052
Yep, sounds incredibly based

62366590
>>62365989
Delusion
Just look at families walking around

62366599
>>62365958
>>62365953
Do you know any married men
And those things can be deal breakers, there are lines/limits

62366630
>>62365540
the only girls that care about careers in 2026 are egg freezing hags. you need just enough money to get to where women are (like the bar or anywhere else) and live somewhere. anything past that is diminishing returns.

62366635
anon don't listen to desperate insecure virgins for dating advice
the world is full of poor women who will date you if you have a good personality
when my wife and I started dating, I was literally unemployed and living with my parents
Now I make more than her but it took me 5 years to get there.

62366639
>>62365555
>I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection

Dad?

62366677
>>62365608
all of these women made a different man spend thousands and wait months before fucking really makes you ponder

62366728
>>62366599

item.title: So when is SPCX going to crash? — 12 replies — 16.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
So when is SPCX going to crash?

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-14 19:08 UTC

OP

> Next FOMC meeting
> Next earnings date
> Right when it gets into the Nasdaq100
> ?
There is no way that a company priced in hopium that actually loses money is not going to crash like a shitcoin at some point.

Early replies (first 3)

62366003
>>62365854
When is TSLA going to crash?

Musk can string out the SPCX hopium even longer than the TSLA hopium, possibly for decades.

62366023
>>62365854
I expect that every test launch of a SuperHeavy/Starship will create an options trader's dream.
* rocket blows up, stock price plunges
* test goes perfectly, stock price zooms

So, just trade straddles starting a day or two before every big event.

Ever seen Boeing's stock price after a crash? One plane goes down, whole stock drops. Never mind that it's usually either defective maintenance or the pilots' fault.

62366153
>>62365854
Look at this as you'd look at a shitcoin TGE.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366334
>>62366153
Shitcoins crash so fucking hard when they do.

62366341
>>62366003
Tesla actually makes money, Spacex is a bunch of AI space datacenters dream bullshit. Only Starlink makes any money in it.

62366378
It will never be below 135. Only low iq brainlests that don’t understand how important mass/cost to orbit is and how important orbital refueling is think it like mega epic overvalued

Oh and SpaceX currently has no heavy lift competition. Only Amazon is in the field and their rocket exploded recently, they are years behind. Other competitors like rklb and fly can barely do small lift. Rklb is still working on neutron to compete with falcon on medium lift. SpaceX is a monopoly currently that will unlock the next frontier. But yeah you’re right, there is nothing to do in space and its just going to crash

62366436
>>62366378
Nigga once the money tap breaks down the market gets fucking fair very fucking quick.
Tesla has done -75% in the past.

62366443
>>62366003
Tesla makes cars, ai, robots, charging stations, solar panels, power batteries and electrical grid technology.
It wont.

62366451
>>62366436
Okay? It has also do 25000% growth since 2013. Your rebuttal?

62366518
>>62366451
The point is to figure out when it is going to crash to buy very low. If you want to get it now that is trading at infinite pe ratio go ahead.

62366779
>>62365854
Even if its not vaporware, these projects all take decades. There will be multiple overall market crashes/correctioba before they get anything done. Being a single stock, its gonna crash more often then the whole market. 100% chance of a dump right before any big got contracts are announces too so insiders can load up.

62366790
When all of Reddit and biz thinks something’s gonna crash, it’s probably gonna moon

Not in the stock but am now tempted for a short term position

item.title: The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. — 63 replies — 15.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants.

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-06-14 15:39 UTC

OP

The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. He's upper class. And has 3 passports and owns properties and businesses (wealth) around the world. He isn't waiting on a paycheck to drive down to Costco.
Hint: it's a Rothschild property.
Making even a million bucks a year writing code for Elon or Bezos or Brin does NOT put you in the upper class. At all.
I am European and only we have class. We invented class.

Early replies (first 3)

62356062
>>62356048
Before AI, you could write code for ten years and then buy this.

62356086
Got so mad in the other thread you thought you would start a new thread about it LMAO

62356191
this is that same polish guy who was seething in the other thread about class or whatever

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62360102
>>62360058
why is a 24 year old mulatto born again christian zoomer trying to give me life advice?

62360116
>>62359522
you have free will to do what you want. But be warned that you lash out at the unblemished Lamb of God. The Alpha and the Omega who healed every infirmity and cast out demons from the land. The Good Shepherd who has defeated and and is Seated at the right hand of Power. The sad thing about people like you is that you are so fallen and your nature is so corrupt that you cannot even hear the Truth if it was read to you. Even the demons themselves that Jesus drove out of people KNEW that he was the Son of the Most High. Repent brother. The Kingdom of Heaven is at hand. We know not the day nor the hour of His return

62360814
>>62359005
>these death monuments will be renouned and respected and not some dinky little tourist hotsp-ACK

62361163
>>62357608
Why do people hate on these posts instead of try to figure out ways to improve their quality of life to have similar?

That's the whole point of this board. Instead of hating on people showing off their wealth figure out how to get it too.

I thought it was only like this on hip hop forums. Everyone hat s on each other and then refuse all ways of getting to it.

62361183
>>62359210
Or stop all or nothing thinking and find a way to live well so you can have wealth and not have to compromise yourself in any way?

62362527
>>62356048
Why would I want such a monstrosity.

62362541
>>62360116
>unfathomably based life speaking minister of /biz
I will miss you when the tranny kike mods ban you for speaking truth, but I know you will bear your cross with dignity.

62362654
>>62356048
why would you even want this? what are you going to use it for? throw parties 24/7 for people you fucking hate? If you live their 24/7 the nice view and garden just become mundane like everything else only now you have a lot less money

62362675
>>62362527
You’re not European, you would not get it.

62362885
>>62358695
>stay poor and let the Jews control wealth and power like a good goy

62363916
>>62356048
everyone there is a pedophile and you'd be asked to leave if you said nigger or faggot. pass.

62363922
>>62356062
Is becoming an expert in AI still a way to make money at all?

62364033
>>62362527
Nothing that a lick of paint, some landscaping and interior decorating couldn't fix. Location, location, location.

62364034
>>62356048
looks boring and not very comfy

62364139
>>62359212
Perhaps we are in hell.

62364148
>>62356048
>We invented class.
But you're not in it.

62364174
>>62356048
That’s nice buddy

62364781
>>62356048
Yeah and when the chips were on the ground and it came to violence the European elite were pretty much powerless to stop the germans twice.

Rich and WEAK.

meanwhile it was the poor, but self sustainable and smart North American freemen that had to save you TWICE.

Stop idolizing the rich and upper class. They are garbage retards, their only contribution is capital, but is capital really just ones and zeros on a hard drive, is that really what drives the will and spirit of a nation? The rich are retards.

62364790
Have you seen the movie with valkyrie niw thats a hot woman. Those other women no I have some morals im not fucking no one. Lol

62364797
>>62356048
I am the CEO of a very major circumcision equipment company and I endorse this message.

62364997
>>62357456
Bet he watches MTV's cribs all day. And thinks posh tacky is better than burger punk tacky. Lots of rich people do not live beyond their means to show off. It can even be hard to tell they are rich. It is the obscenely old money rich and new money niggers who have those villas. Or giant ye-haw ranch style estates you find distasteful.

62365139
>>62358413
What store do you run?

62365155
>>62356048
Rothchilds don’t have a dollar amount worth like we think, the Rothchilds simply have infinite power to do as they want, the entire world’s economic output is in their hands and they have the connections with every elite of whom have connections with all the powerful people to get anything done they desire. They just can’t do extreme projects where they have like a million slaves to build them a mansion on the moon, without causing a goyim uprising, that’s the endgame of the Jews, to have the ability to truly freely do anything they want with zero resistance.

62365166
Europeans also cucked nobility with the Hanseatic League and private banking families.

62365170
>>62363922
Ai needs arms and legs

62365198
>>62365155
Goyim are annoying.

62365372
>>62358695
With they way you are talking you are lukewarm, you should repent.

>Muh Jesus Christ but I curse and talk hatered.
You should act good first other wise your believe in Jesus Christ are fake and Worth nothing. Acting from love = Jesus Christ. Meanwhile you posted hatred and curses.

62365921
>>62358695
>meditate of the words of Jesus Christ
> There is neither Jew nor Greek, slave nor free, male nor female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.
> You worship what you do not know; we worship what we do know, for salvation is from the Jews.

Cognitive dissonant christcuck faggot who thinks his religion is based and redpilled because can’t cope with the fact it is Jewish slop because he made it his whole identity and his ego too fragile to accept how wrong it is

62365927
>>62365139
Can't say but it's not the usual 'dropship on le amazon' type stuff you hear. There are niches out there to find

62366101
>>62356048
ok, and? is that your place?

item.title: (srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb? — 25 replies — 13.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
(srs post) thoughts on my nostradamus'ing? Good? Meh? Dumb?

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-06-14 18:04 UTC

OP

June 11: chop as market gets ready for pump on spacex trading day

June 12 - June 16: iran FUD is metabolized and market goes up on spacex


June 17 - June 22: FOMC on June 16 EOD causes fud, plus more iran fears

June 22 - Oct 10: NDQ floats upwards 40% while S&P chops and eventually goes up 10%

Oct 10: NDQ reaches a generational top - OpenAI IPOs - Fed announces more hikes due to AI labor inflation - republicans lose congress making trump a lame duck president = no more stimulus grift to pump markets
Oct 10, 2026 - ~Oct 10 2027: as a consequence of the lame duck presidency and the lack of stimulus and the selling of AI venture capital bags onto retail, S&P sells off 40% to round trip all the way back down to 5000

~Oct 10 2027: anthropic ipos

~Oct 10 2027 onwards: pretty much a new 20 year cycle begins and most likely the end of humanity as we birth sentience of machines.

Early replies (first 3)

62349969
you need to factor in the wc which is the biggest npc bread & circus event in modern history

62349972
>>62349960
i just matched up the timelines for 1973 and 2000 btw, that's where I'm getting the play by play for things. I reckon the trading AI's are probably averaging the two together given the macro environment

62349980
>>62349969
ah good point, ya so that might erase the june 17 - june 22 fud period and we go straight into june 22 - oct 10 period

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62350015
>>62349960
Eh. I think they'll just turn shit up to 11 because Bank of America lost.

62352238
biz, so far my prediction is working, stop posting on 1pbtid pepe threads, and let me know if my predictions are shit or not

62353716
snailposting this shit since you retards only want to respond to 1pbtid's

62353764
>>62353716
It'll be a lost decade. It'll take 5-7 years for first new nuclear reactors to come online to unclog the the backlog of ai data centers that will be getting shit canned later this year or next after the crash.

Commodities will be the main play. World needs real resources to build infrastructure and robots. Shit doesn't mine itself out of the ground.

62353866
>>62353764
thanks, yea, seems to be that way. Right around 1973 market peak to 1975ish, gold picked up a 2x bid, so I imagine other commodities would follow suit

It's hard to imagine though, because I look around and I still to this day don't see labor inflation, yet everyone is speaking about how all this build out is happening. If it's happening, why doesn't it show up in labor? That's the first bottleneck that'll show up, no? It showed up in 08, are we saying all the mining and manufacturing just simply doesn't require that many humans? That seems a little bit farfetched to me

62355245
>>62349960
elf

62359675
snailposting this shit since you retards only want to respond to 1pbtid's x2

62359708
Sex with Frieren

62359749
>>62359675
what do you want to hear? the market will go up or go down. your doom pronouncement is stupid since people have been predicting the apocalypse for thousands of years and have always been wrong. also LLMs are gay and AI companies deserve to be buried in piracy and antitrust lawsuits by the next administration. I hope every AI ceo ends up in jail

62359780
>>62359708
Sex with this anon

62359931
>>62359749
fuck yourself, im gonna keep snailposting till you retards give me some concrete nostradamus dates and counter reasoning exactly like you retards do on the 1pbtid pepe threads

62359962
Line will continue up until 7/4/28
7*4 = 28 and they get the satisfaction of destroying a holiday. Will also hand everything to the dems in the next election.

62359991
>>62349960
This is now a Flielen thread

62359998
>>62359991

62361834
snailposting for continued feedback, you're not getting rid of me that easily

62361911
>>62349960
Woah wait a second Frieren, the FOMC is next week? Fucccccccckkkk I need to deleverage.
>FOMC -> NDQ goes up
Walk me through this part if they hike wouldn't that cause a dump or something not more pumping? So should I hold my bullish positions or not? Also I'm pretty sure both Anthropic and OpenAI ipo this year in that order.

62361941
>>62353866
this year I saw a lot of ads for oil related jobs masquerading aa youtube shorts
not sure if that counts

62363423
>>62361911
when trump said he'll be signing the agreement on sunday, the target rates dumped

https://www.cmegroup.com/markets/interest-rates/cme-fedwatch-tool.html

warsh is gonna come out next week and be dovish, but the market will act like its not simply because they're range trading, and they're gonna rebuy their positions.

62364277
motheryuckers, this snail post will exist for years

62364284
>>62349960
>metabolized
Stop reading right there.

62366455
>>62364284

don't worry, illiterate retard opinions aren't needed

62366592
>>62366455
I didn't give an opinion.
